sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94845" key="skiatrafe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκῐᾱτρᾰφ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n94845.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σκιατροφέω</ref> </xr> (q.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
